issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with proper cost condition. The DSL shows Activated but lacks the cost specification (➁ = rest 2 DON). The activation cost must be represented as a condition or precondition.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is not supported by card text. Card text contains only one Activate ability; there is no trigger for playing self.
Action order: Rest is optional ('You may rest this Character'), so it should be conditional or the structure should reflect optionality. DrawCard is mandatory if rest is chosen.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] ➁ (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.) You may rest this Character: Draw 1 card.
